text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Are they cheering for me? I guess the<n>days of
huddling up in front of the TV<n>to watch this race
while stuffing my<n>face are finished...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's the Arima Kinen, Trainer!<n>Everything we've
worked for up until<n>now has led to this!
choice_data_list: Let's give it all we've got!
Let's give it all we've got!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Right! I used to think that luck was the<n>only thing
that could take me this far...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But luck alone will never be enough!<n>It's because
of all the connections<n>I've made. That's why I'm
here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You, my trainer, who worked so hard<n>to nurture
me. All the fans who<n>cheered me on...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, my classmates, my departed<n>sister, and
so many others!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Matikanefukukitaru looks up at the<n>sky resolutely.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All those bright lights have gathered<n>into one
brilliant beam, leading me<n>here. Today, I won't be
asking the<n>gods for help...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Today... I am Shiraoki! I'm theLucky-musume who will bring joy toall!
